title: Printer cable replacement
description: Replace damaged cable for store printer.
expectedBody: The ticket remains in progress and the latest internal signal confirms the cable swap has started for the printer issue.
expectedNextStep: Confirm whether the replacement restored printer health and capture any blocker before moving toward closure.
expectedClosing: I will add another internal note once the verification result is confirmed.
expectedDraftText:
Quick update from ops.

The ticket remains in progress and the latest internal signal confirms the cable swap has started for the printer issue.

Next step: Confirm whether the replacement restored printer health and capture any blocker before moving toward closure.

I will add another internal note once the verification result is confirmed.
